name: Kotak White Reserve Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on all international transactions
5X Reward Points on travel and dining spends
2 Reward Points per ₹150 on all other purchases

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass
Complimentary golf at select courses (4 rounds/quarter)
pros: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
Premium metal card with concierge services
Strong milestone benefits worth up to ₹12,500
Golf and Taj Epicure membership included
cons: Point value could be higher for a super-premium card
idealFor: High-income individuals who travel internationally frequently
Users looking for unlimited lounge access with premium perks

faqs.question: Is this a metal card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Kotak White Reserve is a premium metal card with a distinctive white design.

faqs.question: How does the unlimited lounge access work?
faqs.answer: You get a complimentary Priority Pass membership with unlimited visits to 1,300+ lounges worldwide for both domestic and international travel.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹10,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: Can I transfer points to airlines?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kotak Reward Points can be converted to airline miles through select transfer partners via the Kotak rewards portal.
